questions.question: Why is feature engineering often more impactful than choosing a fancier algorithm?
questions.questionZh: 为什么特征工程（Feature Engineering）往往比选择更复杂的算法（Algorithm）更能显著提升模型效果？
options: Feature engineering makes the code run faster
Good features expose patterns to the model that raw data hides, making even simple models effective
Feature engineering eliminates the need for a test set
Fancy algorithms cannot process raw data
optionsZh: 特征工程（Feature Engineering）能够加快代码的运行速度。
优质的特征（features）能够向模型（model）揭示原始数据（raw data）中隐藏的模式，从而使即使是简单的模型也能发挥出色的效果。
特征工程（Feature Engineering）消除了对测试集（Test Set）的需求。
高级算法 (algorithms) 无法处理原始数据 (raw data)。
questions.explanation: The representation of data matters more than the algorithm. A well-engineered feature like BMI (weight/height^2) directly exposes the relevant pattern, making even logistic regression competitive with complex ensembles.
questions.explanationZh: 数据表示（Data Representation）比算法（Algorithm）更重要。像 BMI (weight/height^2) 这样精心构建的特征（Feature）能够直接揭示相关的数据模式，使得即便是逻辑回归（Logistic Regression）也能与复杂的集成模型（Ensemble Models）具备同等的竞争力。

questions.question: What is one-hot encoding?
options: Replacing each category with its frequency in the dataset
Creating one binary column per category, with exactly one column set to 1 per row
Converting all features to values between 0 and 1
Encoding the target variable as a probability
optionsZh: 将每个类别 (Category) 替换为其在数据集 (Dataset) 中的频次 (Frequency)
为每个类别创建一个二值列（binary column），且每行中恰好有一列的值设为 1。
将所有特征 (Feature) 转换为 0 到 1 之间的值
将目标变量 (Target Variable) 编码为概率形式
questions.explanation: One-hot encoding creates a binary column for each unique category. For a color feature with values red/blue/green, it produces three columns: is_red, is_blue, is_green.
questions.explanationZh: 独热编码（One-hot encoding）会为每个唯一类别创建一个二元列（binary column）。对于取值为 red/blue/green 的颜色特征（feature），它将生成三列：is_red、is_blue 和 is_green。

questions.question: What is the data leakage risk with target encoding?
questions.questionZh: 目标编码（Target Encoding）存在怎样的数据泄露（Data Leakage）风险？
options: It makes the model too slow to train
It replaces categories with the mean target value, which can leak information from the test set if not computed on training data only
It creates too many features
It only works with binary targets
optionsZh: 这会导致模型训练速度过慢。
该方法使用目标均值（mean target value）替换类别（categories），若未仅在训练数据（training data）上计算该值，则可能导致测试集（test set）的信息泄露（information leakage）。
它会生成过多的特征 (features)
它仅适用于二分类目标 (binary targets)。
questions.explanation: Target encoding replaces each category with the mean target for that category. If computed on the full dataset (including test data), test labels leak into training features, inflating performance estimates.
questions.explanationZh: 目标编码（Target Encoding）将每个类别替换为该类别对应的目标均值。若在完整数据集（包含测试数据）上进行计算，测试标签会泄露至训练特征中，从而导致性能评估结果虚高。

questions.question: TF-IDF weights a word by its inverse document frequency. What is the effect?
questions.questionZh: 词频-逆文档频率（TF-IDF）根据逆文档频率（Inverse Document Frequency）对词语进行加权。这会产生什么效果？
options: Common words like 'the' get high weight because they appear frequently
Rare, distinctive words get higher weight while common words get lower weight
All words get equal weight regardless of frequency
Only the most frequent word in each document is kept
optionsZh: 像“the”这类常见词（common words）由于出现频率较高，会被赋予较高的权重（weight）。
罕见且具有区分度的词会获得更高的权重（weight），而常见词则会获得较低的权重。
所有词汇均赋予相同权重（weight），与词频（frequency）无关。
仅保留每个文档中出现频率最高的词（most frequent word）。
questions.explanation: IDF = log(total docs / docs containing word). Common words (appearing in many documents) get low IDF. Rare, distinctive words get high IDF, making them more influential in the representation.
questions.explanationZh: 逆文档频率（Inverse Document Frequency）的计算公式为 IDF = log(total docs / docs containing word)。常见词（出现在大量文档中）的 IDF 值较低。罕见且具有区分度的词则会获得较高的 IDF 值，从而在文本表示（representation）中发挥更大的影响力。

questions.question: You have two features with correlation 0.98. Why might you remove one?
questions.questionZh: 如果你有两个相关性 (correlation) 为 0.98 的特征 (features)，为什么可能会考虑移除其中一个？
options: Highly correlated features always cause the model to crash
They are redundant -- both carry nearly the same information, and keeping both increases overfitting risk without adding signal
Correlated features make the data non-stationary
Correlation above 0.5 means the features are measuring different things
optionsZh: 高度相关的特征 (Highly correlated features) 总是会导致模型崩溃。
它们是冗余的——两者携带的信息几乎相同，同时保留它们不仅无法增加有效信号，反而会提高过拟合（overfitting）的风险。
相关特征 (Correlated features) 会导致数据非平稳 (non-stationary)。
相关性 (Correlation) 高于 0.5 意味着这些特征 (Features) 衡量的是不同的事物。
questions.explanation: Features with r=0.98 are nearly redundant. Keeping both adds a noisy duplicate that increases dimensionality, overfitting risk, and multicollinearity without providing new information about the target.
questions.explanationZh: 相关系数 r=0.98 的特征（Features）几乎冗余。同时保留两者会引入带有噪声的重复项，从而增加维度（Dimensionality）、过拟合风险（Overfitting risk）和多重共线性（Multicollinearity），且无法为目标变量（Target）提供新的信息。
